_doc: THROWAWAY one-field read (char-run-trigger, ckpt 150): the dash double-tap WINDOW the AI 0x478ba0 reads as *(*0x8a6e80+0xf8) for FUN_00479e70 (both window params).  Config god-object, set at engine init -> valid at the title (no nav needed).  Hooked at the per-Flip 0x5b8fc0 (fires every frame incl. title).  RUN: frida_capture.py --field-spec tools/flow/dash_window_field.json --field-spec-only --max-frames 120 --duration-ms 20000 --run-dir runs/dash-window.

0x5b8fc0.name: cfg_probe
0x5b8fc0._note: FUN_005b8fc0 Flip (once/frame). Read the input-config double-tap window.
